name: Atico Mining Corporation
description: Atico Mining Corporation is a Vancouver-based copper-gold producer and explorer operating primarily in Latin America. The company's flagship asset is the El Roble Mine in the Choco department of Colombia, a high-grade underground VMS-style deposit with a nominal processing capacity of 1,000 tonnes per day producing approximately 16 million pounds of copper and 11,000 ounces of gold annually. Atico also holds the pre-development La Plata copper-gold-zinc-silver project in Ecuador, providing additional exploration and development upside.
